known_limitations: The qualifying archival event is complete and cannot be repeated through new activity.
Historical attribution can still be complicated by deleted accounts, renamed repositories, and email association at the time of processing.
achievement.name: Arctic Code Vault Contributor
achievement.primary_action: Contributed to qualifying repositories included in the 2020 archive
achievement.trigger: The account authored a commit on the default branch of a repository archived in the 2020 GitHub Arctic Code Vault program.
